# hyperfluid_model_serving (Data Source)

Look up an existing model serving by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reference an existing model serving to read its OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
data "hyperfluid_model_serving" "embeddings" {
  name = "bge-large"
}

output "endpoint" {
  value = data.hyperfluid_model_serving.embeddings.endpoint
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Model serving name.

### Read-Only

- `cpu` (String) CPU request resolved by the platform.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `endpoint` (String) OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
- `gpu` (Number) GPU count.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier (same as name).
- `max_model_len` (Number) Maximum model context length.
- `memory` (String) Memory request.
- `model_id` (String) Model identifier.
- `model_type` (String) Model type (generation or embedding).
- `phase` (String) Current lifecycle phase.
- `ready_replicas` (Number) Ready replica count.
- `replicas` (Number) Desired replica count.
- `runtime` (String) Serving runtime (vllm or tgi).
